headline: How to Approach Abbott Stock Following Its Sharp YTD Decline?
summary: ABT falls 29.4% YTD as respiratory testing weakness, China uncertainty and acquisition dilution pressure results and outlook.

headline: Labcorp Announces Nationwide Availability of ColoSense®, the First FDA-Approved RNA-Based At-Home Colorectal Cancer Screening Test
summary: Labcorp (NYSE: LH), a global leader of innovative and comprehensive laboratory services, today announced the nationwide availability of ColoSense®, the only RNA-based at-home test for colorectal cancer (CRC) screening approved by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA). Offered through a commercial collaboration with test developer Geneoscopy, ColoSense expands Labcorp's comprehensive portfolio of colorectal cancer screening solutions.
